briefs.title: BC Small Claims Court rules updated to reflect Civil Resolution Tribunal changes, effective January 19, 2026
briefs.summary: BC is updating its Small Claims Court rules to remove outdated procedures and align with how the Civil Resolution Tribunal (an online dispute resolution body that handles smaller claims) now operates. The changes take effect January 19, 2026.
briefs.action_required: If you have an active or upcoming Small Claims matter in BC, confirm your process with the court before January 19, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Small Claims Rules amendments take effect
